# Verify Affiliate Review Conflict Disguise

## Claim being tested

A review/ranking is independent editorial advice.

## Alternative hypothesis

Affiliate incentives shape ranking, review sentiment, or product inclusion without clear disclosure.

## Data fields

- affiliate links
- disclosure location
- ranking criteria
- product selection
- commission differences
- update history
- author expertise
- negative-review handling

## Metrics

- disclosure visibility
- affiliate-link coverage
- commission/ranking correlation
- product omission analysis
- review text sentiment vs payout potential
- competitor comparison fairness

## Safe conclusion

"The ranking may be commercially biased if monetization incentives are hidden or align strongly with favourable placement."
